nasb.text: No longer shall your name be called Abram, But your name shall be Abraham; For I have made you the father of a multitude of nations.

esv.text: No longer shall your name be called Abram, but your name shall be Abraham,  for I have made you the father of a multitude of nations.

cnv.text: 你的名不要再叫亞伯蘭， 要叫亞伯拉罕，因為我已經立了你作萬國的父。

ccb.text: 以后你的名字不再叫亚伯兰，要改为亚伯拉罕，因为我要立你为万族之父。

csbs.text: 你的名字不再叫亚伯兰，而要叫亚伯拉罕，因为我已立你为多国之父。
